meta.title: mei skin — Boutique Skincare · Vancouver
meta.description: mei skin — Boutique korean Facials in Kitsilano, Vancouver. High-Frequency, Peels, Facial Massage, LED Therapy. By Appointment.
meta.og_description: Boutique Facials in Kitsilano, Vancouver. Skincare, Curated.

comingSoon.title: *coming* soon.
comingSoon.sub: We're opening the doors shortly. If you have the password, step inside.

hero.title:
Your skin,
*well-kept.*
hero.sub: A skincare practice where every visit gets one face's worth of attention. Treatments are chosen, not templated — matched to what your skin needs this week.

philosophy.title:
Customized Skin Care.
*Glowing* results.
philosophy.lede: A full hour. One person. No clock in the room. Before a single product touches your skin, it's read — closely, honestly. What comes next is chosen for what we see, not for what's easiest to sell.

triad.title: *Read*
triad.body: Every first visit begins in stillness — good light, no clock running. We ask about your skin's history, its habits, what brought you to us. Nothing is assumed.

triad.title: *Treat*
triad.body: The treatment is chosen for what your skin is doing today, not last month. Cleanse, exfoliation, modalities — each one selected, none of it routine. It closes with a slow lymphatic finish.

triad.title: *tend*
triad.body: You leave with a personalized plan to carry it forward. Nothing is upsold. If your skin doesn't need a product, we won't hand you one.

studioSplit.title: a relaxing space. *experience* a retreat for your skin.
studioSplit.body_p1_before_link: mei skin is built around the belief that skin care is personal. step inside.
studioSplit.body_p1_after_link: on west broadway, there's a single treatment room, a single appointment slot per hour, and a single person caring for your skin from start to finish.
studioSplit.body_p2: we combine a spa experience with results reflecting the approach of skin clinics in Japan and South Korea, using the same medical-grade Korean formulations alongside advanced skin technologies.
studioSplit.frame_label: a quite treatment room and natural studio light

services.title: the menu.
services.note: the prices below are the prices you pay — no add-ons at the desk.

items.name: the mei reset facial (recovery + restoration)
items.description: the result is calmer, clearer skin with enhanced barrier function, and a replenished complexion.

items.name: microneedling
items.description: collagen induction therapy for fine lines, acne scarring, and overall skin density. numbing, a precise pen depth, and gentle aftercare.

items.name: the mei glow facial (refinement + radiance)
items.description: a boutique 60-minute Korean facial tailored to enhance tone, refine texture, and promote a smooth, radiant complexion.

services.footnote: full menu including brow shaping, lash tinting, and body services available on request. members receive priority booking and pricing.

aboutMei.title: meet brrrriannnna
aboutMei.lede: skin care, for me, started with my own. a long stretch of trial and error, a handful of mentors, and the slow realization that the work i wanted to do wasn't in a chain spa — it was in a small room, with one person, taking the time. joean was here
aboutMei.body: i trained in clinical aesthetics in vancouver and spent six years on treatment-room floors at studios across the city before opening mei skin. i still see every visit the same way: it's an hour for you, and the only job is to leave your skin (and you) a little more at home in itself. philip was here
aboutMei.pull_quote: i won't sell you something you don't need. if your skin's doing well, i'll tell you to come back in eight weeks, not six.

atmosphere.title: an hour that's *actually* yours.
atmosphere.body: no rotating staff, no shared waiting room, no other faces in the building during your treatment. just one practitioner, one room, and the time to do the work properly.

items.name: rosa
items.quote: i came in for a peel. she talked me out of it and recommended led + a different home routine instead. that kind of honesty is rare.

items.name: the *studio*
items.address:
inside we do beauty studio
west broadway · kitsilano
vancouver, bc

items.q: what should i expect on my first visit?
items.a: we start with a careful skin reading — under good light, with no clock running. i ask about your routine, your history, and what brought you in. the treatment is chosen for what i see, not a pre-set menu. you'll leave with a written plan and a small kit of samples if desired.

items.q: how long are appointments, and how often should i come?
items.a:
most mei skin appointments are 60–90+ minutes, depending on your treatment and skin goals. your first visit may be slightly longer to allow time for a personalized consultation and skin assessment.or best results, we typically recommend treatments every 4–6 weeks, which aligns with your skin’s natural renewal cycle. however, the ideal frequency depends on your skin concerns, lifestyle, and goals. some clients visit monthly for ongoing maintenance and glow, while others come seasonally or before special events.

during your appointment, we'll create a customized treatment plan and recommend a schedule that works for your skin and your lifestyle.
yes we have retail products from dermabell, éclat du teint, dr.esthé, and more available to purchase on-site.

items.q: i have sensitive or reactive skin. is this for me?
items.a:
absolutely. mei skin specializes in a thoughtful, skin-first approach that prioritizes barrier health, comfort, and long-term skin wellness. every treatment is customized to your skin's needs on the day of your appointment.

if you have sensitive, reactive, redness-prone, or easily irritated skin, we'll carefully select products and techniques that support your skin without overwhelming it. we focus on strengthening and nourishing the skin barrier rather than aggressive treatments that can lead to irritation.

before every facial, we'll discuss your skin history, sensitivities, allergies, and current skincare routine to ensure your treatment is both safe and effective.

our goal is for your skin to leave feeling calm, balanced, and healthy—not stripped, inflamed, or overworked.

items.q: can i bring products i'm already using?
items.a: please. bring everything — including the things you're embarrassed about. we go through it together and figure out what stays, what goes, and what's missing. no judgment, ever.
24-hour notice for full credit. cancellations inside 24 hours are charged 50% of the booked service. a late cancel means an empty room — i appreciate your help keeping it fair.
yes, in any amount. delivered electronically or as a small printed card. they don't expire.
street parking on west broadway and the side streets, free after 6pm. the studio is a short walk from broadway-city hall (10–12 min) or any bus along the broadway corridor.

seo.street_address: inside we do beauty studio, west broadway

newsletter.title: a personalized *note,* now and then.
newsletter.body: openings, new services, and the occasional skin care thought from mei skin. once a month, never more. unsubscribe whenever — we won't be offended.

footer.tagline: Boutique Facials. Where skin is read, not rushed.
